title: doellingeria ledophylla var. covillei
intro: Doellingeria ledophylla var. covillei is a plant species commonly known as a type of fern, specifically a type of wood fern. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Doellingeria ledophylla var. covillei typically involve infusions and decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas or applied topically to affected areas.
